justification: The diff correctly updates build configs to Java 21 and applies pattern matching for instanceof (lines 498-618) and String.formatted() (line 535), which are idiomatic Java 14+/21 features. It also adds @Serial annotations to serialVersionUID fields (lines 46, 28, 62), addressing a Java 16+ deprecation. Minor deductions: unused imports were removed (e.g., java.util.List in TurismoTest.java), which is good cleanup but not strictly Java 21 idiomatic; the diff is coherent with no spurious changes.
